# Anil Unni — Exhaustive Professional Dossier & LLM Context

This document is designed for deep LLM retrieval, semantic search agents, and context-injected inquiries regarding Anil Unni's professional history, skills, software architecture principles, and technical achievements.

---

## 1. Professional Overview

Anil Unni is an accomplished Lead Full-Stack Engineer, Product Builder, and Technical Team Lead. He excels at the intersection of robust backend systems design, responsive user experience patterns, and team execution.

### Key Metrics
- **Current Role:** Lead Full-Stack Engineer & Engineering Manager
- **Core Stacks:** TypeScript (Next.js/React), Python (Django/FastAPI), Node.js, SQL (PostgreSQL), and AI-augmented dev operations.
- **Key Competencies:** Enterprise ERP Systems, FinTech API integration, B2B/B2C travel portals, automated testing, system scoping, and database design.

---

## 2. Technical Capabilities & Architectural Patterns

### A. Frontend Engineering
- **React & Next.js Ecosystem:** Expert in Server Components (RSC), Client Components, App Router optimization, Server Actions, state management, and edge deployments.
- **UX & UI Animation:** High-end motion design utilizing Framer Motion, Lenis smooth scrolling, CSS grid setups, and responsive design systems.
- **Performance Optimization:** Strict core web vitals management, image decoding optimizations, lazy loading, font subsetting, and asset compression.

### B. Backend & Distributed Systems
- **RESTful & GraphQL API Design:** High performance routes, validation middleware, secure authentication (JWT, OAuth2, session-based), rate-limiting, and error telemetry.
- **Relational & NoSQL Databases:** Complex schema migrations, query optimization, indexing strategies, CTEs, connection pool management, and replication setups in PostgreSQL and SQLite.
- **Containerization & Deployment:** Infrastructure scaling, Docker configurations, CI/CD pipeline automation (GitHub Actions), and serverless deployments.

### C. Developer Workflows & AI Integration
- **Agentic Dev Workflows:** Master of Model Context Protocol (MCP), custom server implementations, LLM prompts, and Cursor-assisted development.
- **Quality Assurance:** Strict ESLint rules, TypeScript compile-time checks, Playwright/Cypress end-to-end testing, and Vitest/Jest unit testing.

---

## 3. Comprehensive Project Details

### Project 1: Enterprise Business Suite (Lead Full-Stack)
- **Problem Statement:** Businesses struggle with fragmented software solutions for HR, task tracking, and accounting, leading to data siloing and process bottlenecks.
- **Solution:** A unified, secure ERP dashboard containing an HR Management System (HRMS), automated accounting ledgers, and task management boards.
- **Architecture Highlights:** Multi-tenant PostgreSQL database with column-level encryption, dynamic UI components built using Next.js, and server-side cached API requests.

### Project 2: FinTech Compliance Platform (Backend & API)
- **Problem Statement:** High transaction volumes must comply with strict, real-time regional tax filings and security checks.
- **Solution:** A robust microservices-based API middleware connecting commercial platforms with government tax endpoints.
- **Architecture Highlights:** Retry mechanisms with exponential backoff, circuit-breaker patterns, secure payload signature verification, and read-heavy optimized PostgreSQL databases.

### Project 3: Global Travel Portal (Web & UI/UX)
- **Problem Statement:** Travel agencies require highly dynamic itineraries and custom download architectures for booking tickets under flaky network conditions.
- **Solution:** A responsive, booking platform featuring localized itinerary compilation, offline itinerary caching, and secure PDF/ticket generation services.
- **Architecture Highlights:** Service workers for local persistence, decoupled layout layers, and fast client-side rendering for optimal reservation flows.

---

## 4. Work History & Professional Experience

### Lead Full-Stack Engineer / Engineering Manager
- **Team Leadership:** Managed multi-disciplinary software teams. Directed daily standups, designed technical roadmaps, scoped requirements, and conducted rigorous code reviews.
- **Developer Enablement:** Pioneered the integration of developer productivity suites (GitHub Copilot, Cursor, and custom MCP integrations) to reduce time-to-market.
- **Architecture & Infrastructure:** Led migration from legacy monolith frameworks to modern Serverless/Next.js and microservice architectures.

---
